debug_info.goal:
X : Type u_1
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace X
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace X
inst✝¹ : LocallyCompactSpace X
inst✝ : T2Space X
μ : ComplexMeasure X
h : ∀ (f : ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap X ℂ), μ.integral ⇑f = 0
⊢ μ = 0

failed_attempts:
_ < ε := hf
  rw [← norm_le_zero_iff]
  exact le_of_forall_pos_le_add this

· exact hg.sub f.integrable
  rw [h_int] at this
  linarith

rw [← ComplexMeasure.norm_eq_zero_iff]
  apply le_antisymm _ (norm_nonneg _)
  by_contra h_pos
  have h_norm : 0 < ‖μ‖ := lt_of_le_of_ne (norm_nonneg _) (Ne.symm h_pos)
  let w := μ.polar
  have hw : Integrable (star w) μ.var := (integrable_polar _).star
  obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := ContinuousMap.integrable_sub_approx_compact_support hw h_norm
  have h_int : ∫ x, star (w x) ∂μ = ‖μ‖ := by
    rw [ComplexMeasure.integral_eq_integral_withDensity _ hw, ← ComplexMeasure.withDensity_polar]
    simp only [w, RCLike.conj_mul, ComplexMeasure.norm_polar_eq_one, Complex.ofReal_one,
      integral_const, Measure.restrict_univ, Complex.ofReal_inj, ComplexMeasure.norm_eq_vide]
  have := calc
    ‖μ‖ = ‖∫ x, star (w x) ∂μ - μ.integral (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ofCompactlySupported g)‖ := by
      rw [h_int, h]; simp
    _ = ‖∫ x, (star (w x) - g x) ∂μ‖ := by
      rw [integral_sub hw (g.continuous.integrable_of_compact_support g.hasCompactSupport _)]
      rfl
    _ ≤ ∫ x, ‖star (w x) - g x‖ ∂μ.var := ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_integral_norm _ _
    _ < ‖μ‖ := hg
  exact lt_irrefl _ this

rw [← MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.totalVariation_zero_iff]
  let ν := μ.totalVariation
  let w := μ.rnDeriv ν
  -- By the uniqueness of positive measures on LCH spaces, it suffices to show ∫ f dν = 0
  -- for all continuous compactly supported f.
  refine MeasureTheory.Measure.eq_zero_of_forall_integral_zero_continuous (fun f hf_cont hf_supp ↦ ?_)
  -- We have ∫ f dν = ∫ f * conj(w) * w dν = ∫ f * conj(w) dμ.
  -- We approximate g := f * conj(w) in L^1(ν) by functions in C_0(X).
  let g : X → ℂ := fun x ↦ (f x : ℂ) * conj (w x)
  have hg_mem : Memℒp g 1 ν := by
    apply Memℒp.mul_of_bound (MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.rnDeriv_memℒp _ _) _ (‖f‖)
    filter_upwards [hf_supp.measure_zero_compl] with x hx
    by_cases hfx : x ∈ f.support
    · exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (hf_cont.norm_le_norm_of_mem_support hfx) (norm_nonneg _)
    · simp only [Function.support_subset_iff, Set.mem_compl_iff] at hx
      simp [hx]
  -- Use density of C_0 in L^1
  obtain ⟨seq, hseq⟩ := MeasureTheory.ContinuousMap.dense_in_Lp_of_compact_support hg_mem
  have lim_zero : Tendsto (fun n ↦ μ.integral (seq n)) atTop (𝓝 (∫ x, g x ∂μ)) := by
    rw [← MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.integral_eq_integral_rnDeriv]
    apply Tendsto.congr_dist (Tendsto.const_mul _ hseq)
    sorry -- Integral inequality |∫ (u - v) dμ| ≤ ∫ |u - v| d|μ|
  -- Since μ.integral (seq n) = 0, the limit is 0
  simp [h] at lim_zero
  have int_g_eq_zero : ∫ x, g x ∂μ = 0 := lim_zero
  -- Conclude
  rw [MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.integral_eq_integral_rnDeriv, ← int_g_eq_zero]
  apply Integral_congr_ae
  filter_upwards [MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.norm_rnDeriv_eq_one μ] with x hx
  simp only [g, star, RCLike.star_def, mul_assoc, RCLike.conj_mul_eq_norm_sq_left, hx, one_mul]
  rfl

rw [← μ.variation_eq_zero]
  let v := μ.variation
  have : IsFiniteMeasure v := inferInstance
  -- The linear functional Φ(g) = ∫ g dμ = ∫ g * polar dv extends to L^1(v)
  let Φ := MeasureTheory.L1.integralCLM ℂ v ∘L MeasureTheory.L1.withDensityCLM ℂ v μ.polar
  -- Φ vanishes on C_c(X) because it vanishes on C_0(X)
  have hΦ : ∀ f : C_c(X, ℂ), Φ (toLp 1 v f) = 0 := fun f ↦ by
    simp only [Φ, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, L1.withDensityCLM_apply, L1.integralCLM_apply]
    rw [← VectorMeasure.integral_eq_integral_withDensity_polar]
    exact h (CompactlySupportedContinuousMap.toZeroAtInfty f)
  -- Since C_c(X) is dense in L^1(v), Φ = 0
  have h_dense := MeasureTheory.L1.denseRange_continuousCompactSupport v
  have h0 : Φ = 0 := ContinuousLinearMap.ext_on_dense h_dense hΦ
  -- Evaluating Φ at the conjugate of the polar function yields the total variation
  let g := toLp 1 v (fun x ↦ RCLike.star (μ.polar x))
  have h_eval : Φ g = v Set.univ := by
    simp only [Φ, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, L1.withDensityCLM_apply, L1.integralCLM_apply]
    rw [integral_congr_ae (μ.norm_polar_eq_one.mono fun x hx ↦ ?_)]
    · simp
    · simp [hx, RCLike.star_mul_self]
  -- Thus |μ|(X) = 0
  apply le_antisymm _ (zero_le _)
  rw [← h_eval, h0]
  simp

rw [← ComplexMeasure.norm_eq_zero_iff]
  by_contra h_nz
  let ν := μ.var
  let w := μ.rnDeriv
  have hw : ∀ᵐ x ∂ν, ‖w x‖ = 1 := ComplexMeasure.norm_rnDeriv_eq_one μ
  let g : X → ℂ := fun x ↦ conj (w x)
  have hg : MemLp g 1 ν := by
    refine ⟨μ.measurable_rnDeriv.conj, ?_⟩
    simp_rw [norm_conj]
    filter_upwards [hw] with x hx using by simp [hx]
    exact (Measure.integrable_const 1).2 (measure_lt_top _ _)
  let ε := ‖μ‖ / 2
  have hε : 0 < ε := half_pos (lt_of_le_of_ne (norm_nonneg _) (Ne.symm h_nz))
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ : ∃ f : CompactlySupportedContinuousMap X ℂ, snorm (g - f) 1 ν < ENNReal.ofReal ε := by
    have := MeasureTheory.Lp.denseRange_continuousCompactSupport (X := X) (p := 1) (μ := ν) (𝕜 := ℂ)
    exact Metric.mem_closure_range_iff.1 this (hg.toLp g) _ (ENNReal.ofReal_pos.2 hε)
  have f_int : Integrable f ν := f.continuous.integrable_of_hasCompactSupport ν f.hasCompactSupport
  have int_f_zero : ∫ x, f x * w x ∂ν = 0 := by
    rw [← ComplexMeasure.integral_eq_integral_rnDeriv]
    exact h ⟨f, f.is_zeroAtInfty⟩
    exact f_int
  have : ‖μ‖ ≤ snorm (g - f) 1 ν := by
    calc ‖μ‖ = ‖∫ x, g x * w x ∂ν‖ := by
             rw [integral_congr_ae (by filter_upwards [hw] with x hx; simp [g, hx, RCLike.conj_mul])]
             simp only [MeasureTheory.integral_const, Measure.measure_univ_eq_norm, smul_eq_mul, mul_one, norm_norm]
         _ = ‖∫ x, (g x - f x) * w x ∂ν‖ := by
             rw [sub_mul, integral_sub hg.integrable f_int, int_f_zero, sub_zero]
         _ ≤ ∫ x, ‖(g x - f x) * w x‖ ∂ν := norm_integral_le_integral_norm _
         _ = ∫ x, ‖g x - f x‖ ∂ν := by
             apply integral_congr_ae; filter_upwards [hw] with x hx
             simp [hx]
         _ = snorm (g - f) 1 ν := by
             rw [snorm_one_eq_lintegral_nnnorm, integral_norm_eq_lintegral_nnnorm]
             exact (hg.sub f_int)
  exact not_le_of_lt hf (ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal hε.le (by simp) this)

rw [← ComplexMeasure.variation_eq_zero_iff, ← Measure.measure_univ_eq_zero]
  let ν := μ.variation
  have : IsFiniteMeasure ν := inferInstance
  let h_meas := μ.rnDeriv ν
  have h_dens := ContinuousCompactSupport.denseRange_toLp_of_finiteMeasure ℂ 1 ν
  let Φ : Lp ℂ 1 ν →L[ℂ] ℂ := MeasureTheory.VectorMeasure.integralLpClm μ
  have hΦ : ∀ f : C_c(X, ℂ), Φ (Lp.toLp 1 ν ℂ f) = 0 := fun f => by
    simp only [MeasureTheory.VectorMeasure.integralLpClm_toLp]
    exact h (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ofCompact f)
  have hΦ_zero : Φ = 0 := ContinuousLinearMap.ext_on_dense_range h_dens hΦ
  have : Φ (Lp.toLp 1 ν ℂ (fun x => star (h_meas x))) = 0 := by rw [hΦ_zero]; rfl
  rwa [MeasureTheory.VectorMeasure.integralLpClm_toLp, integral_congr_ae (μ.norm_rnDeriv_eq_one.mono fun x hx => by simp [hx, star_mul_self_eq_norm_mul_norm])] at this

rw [← VectorMeasure.norm_univ_eq_zero]
  by_contra h_nz
  let v := μ.variation
  obtain ⟨g, hg, hg_norm, hg_int⟩ := μ.exists_polar
  have h_int_g : Integrable (conj g) v :=
    Measure.integrable_of_bounded_unary _ (Measurable.conj hg)
      (eventually_of_forall fun x ↦ le_of_eq (hg_norm x))
  have v_pos : 0 < v Set.univ :=
    (Measure.univ_pos_iff.mpr (measure_ne_top v)).mpr (mt Measure.univ_eq_zero_iff.mp h_nz)
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h_int_g.exists_continuous_compact_support_integral_sub_norm_lt
    (ENNReal.div_pos_iff.mpr ⟨v_pos.ne.symm, ENNReal.two_ne_top⟩ : 0 < v Set.univ / 2)
  have : (v Set.univ).toReal ≤ ∫ x, ‖conj (g x) - f x‖ ∂v := calc
    (v Set.univ).toReal = ‖∫ x, conj (g x) * g x ∂v‖ := by
      simp_rw [← Complex.norm_sq_eq_def, hg_norm, Complex.ofReal_one, integral_const,
        smul_eq_mul, mul_one, norm_real, Real.norm_of_nonneg ENNReal.toReal_nonneg]
    _ = ‖∫ x, conj (g x) ∂μ‖ := by rw [hg_int _ h_int_g]
    _ = ‖∫ x, conj (g x) - f x ∂μ‖ := by
      rw [integral_sub h_int_g (Continuous.integrable f.continuous _), h f, sub_zero]
    _ ≤ ∫ x, ‖conj (g x) - f x‖ ∂v := VectorMeasure.norm_integral_le_integral_norm _ _
  exact (lt_self_iff_false _).mp (this.trans_lt hf)
zero_eq_zero]
linarith

rw [← ComplexMeasure.variation_eq_zero_iff, ← Measure.univ_eq_zero_iff]
  by_contra h_ne
  let v := variation μ
  haveI : IsFiniteMeasure v := inferInstance
  let h_pol := μ.polar
  have h_int : Integrable (conj h_pol) v :=
    (integrable_norm_iff (measurable_conj μ.measurable_polar)).mp (by simp [ComplexMeasure.norm_polar])
  have int_eq_zero : μ.integral (conj h_pol) = 0 := by
    -- We define a property on L^1(v) that the integral against μ is zero.
    -- This property holds for C_c(X) (by hypothesis) and is closed in L^1.
    -- Since C_c(X) is dense in L^1(v), it holds for conj h_pol.
    let P : Lp ℂ 1 v → Prop := fun g => μ.integral g = 0
    have P_closed : IsClosed {g | P g} := by
      -- Continuity of g ↦ ∫ g dμ
      have : LipschitzWith 1 (fun (g : Lp ℂ 1 v) => μ.integral g) := by
        intro f g
        simp only [ENNReal.coe_one, one_mul, dist_eq_norm]
        rw [← ComplexMeasure.integral_sub (Lp.integrable _) (Lp.integrable _)]
        apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_integral_norm _ _).trans
        simp only [Lp.norm_toLp, eLpNorm_eq_integral_norm]
        rfl
      exact isClosed_eq this.continuous continuous_const
    have P_Cc : ∀ f : CompactlySupportedContinuousMap X ℂ, P (Lp.toLp 1 v f (f.integrable_of_isFiniteMeasure v)) := by
      intro f
      rw [Lp.toLp_coe_fn _ _ (f.continuous.aestronglyMeasurable), h f]
    exact Lp.denseRange_continuousCompactSupport.induction_on (Lp.toLp 1 v (conj h_pol) h_int) P_closed P_Cc
  rw [ComplexMeasure.integral_eq_integral_polar] at int_eq_zero
  simp only [IsROrC.conj_mul, ComplexMeasure.norm_polar, integral_const, smul_eq_mul, mul_one] at int_eq_zero
  exact h_ne int_eq_zero

rw [← μ.norm_eq_zero_iff, Measure.ext_iff_univ, ← le_zero_iff]
  let ν := μ.var
  have : ∫ x, conj (μ.rnDeriv ν x) ∂μ = ν Set.univ := by
    rw [ComplexMeasure.integral_eq_integral_rnDeriv]
    · simp_rw [← Complex.norm_sq_eq_def, μ.rnDeriv_norm]; simp
    · apply Integrable.conj; rw [integrable_iff_norm]; simp_rw [norm_eq_abs, abs_conj, μ.rnDeriv_norm]; simp
  rw [← this]
  let g : Lp ℂ 1 ν := Lp.ofFn (conj (μ.rnDeriv ν)) (by
    rw [mem_Lp_iff_mem_L1, integrable_iff_norm]; simp_rw [norm_eq_abs, abs_conj, μ.rnDeriv_norm]; simp)
  have h_int_g : ∫ x, g x ∂μ = ∫ x, conj (μ.rnDeriv ν x) ∂μ := rfl
  rw [← h_int_g]
  have h_cont : Continuous (fun (f : Lp ℂ 1 ν) => ∫ x, f x ∂μ) := by
    refine continuous_of_linear_of_bound (fun f => ∫ x, f x ∂μ) (fun f g => integral_add (Lp.integrable f) (Lp.integrable g)) (fun c f => integral_smul c f) 1 (fun f => ?_)
    rw [ComplexMeasure.integral_eq_integral_rnDeriv (Lp.integrable f)]
    calc ‖∫ x, f x * μ.rnDeriv ν x ∂ν‖ ≤ ∫ x, ‖f x * μ.rnDeriv ν x‖ ∂ν := norm_integral_le_integral_norm _
      _ = ∫ x, ‖f x‖ ∂ν := by
        apply integral_congr_ae
        filter_upwards [μ.rnDeriv_norm] with x hx; simp [hx]
      _ = ‖f‖ := by rw [Lp.norm_def]; simp
  have h_dense := MeasureTheory.Lp.compactlySupportedContinuousMap_dense ν
  refine (isClosed_eq h_cont continuous_const).mem_of_dense h_dense ?_ g
  rintro ⟨f, hf⟩
  exact h ⟨f, f.hasCompactSupport.is_zeroAtInfty⟩

    rw [ComplexMeasure.integral_ofReal] at h
  · exact (Complex.ext_iff.mp h).1
  · exact (Complex.ext_iff.mp h).2

· exact Integrable.bounded (f.continuous.integrable v) (Measure.lt_top_of_isFiniteMeasure v _) (by filter_upwards [μ.norm_polar_eq_one] with x hx; simp [hx])
    _ ≤ ∫ x, ‖(star (μ.polar x) - f x) * μ.polar x‖ ∂v := norm_integral_le_integral_norm _

      apply integral_congr_ae

    _ = (∫⁻ x, ‖star (μ.polar x) - f x‖ ∂v).toReal := by
      rw [integral_norm_eq_lintegral_nnnorm]
      · rfl
